caption: A news broadcast features scenes of political figures in India. Men are gathered at an event, several wearing red caps and white traditional attire. In the first three frames, a man in a red cap and white shirt speaks while surrounded by others, including a man with long hair and a beard wearing orange robes. Small inset portraits of political figures appear on the sides of the screen, accompanied by text such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री डॉ. प्रेम कुमार", and "विजय चौधरी". Large red banners display text in Hindi, including "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and "PM मोदी ने नीतीश कुमार को बधाई दी". The bottom ticker shows "MAHAWADW" and the time "10:09 PM". The final frame shifts to a different scene showing a man in a grey vest and white shirt standing behind a podium with his hands pressed together in a greeting.
